title: Graze
description: Let your livestock find their own food and reproduce naturally.
body:
# Graze

**Let your livestock find their own food and reproduce naturally.**

## Introduction

Graze allows farm animals to actively seek out and eat nearby mature crops, automatically entering breeding mode once fed — no need to hand-feed them yourself.

## Features

- 🐄 **Auto Grazing**
- ❤️ **Auto Breeding**
- ⚙️ **Configurable**
- 🔢 **Vanilla Mob Cap**

## Image

![the cow just ate a wheat crop and fell in love](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fLveW9XZ/images/a713d99dddf6009ccd0827b9de4205236bd7d682.png)

## How to Play

Simply plant the corresponding crops near your animals and they will automatically approach, eat, and breed on their own.

Works great alongside automated farms for a fully self-sustaining livestock system!

## Bug Reports & Suggestions

Found a bug or have a feature request? Please open an issue on [Issues](https://github.com/NatsuCamellia/graze/issues)!
